vocab.sentence: The paintings on the wall are beautiful.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 牆上的畫作很漂亮。

vocab.sentence: Do we have enough flowers for our dinner party?
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們的晚宴有足夠的花嗎？

vocab.sentence: A: Which is Kyle's house? B: The red house over there is.
vocab.sentence_chinese: A：哪一個是凱爾的房子？B：那邊那棟紅色的房子是。

vocab.sentence: I am always hot and thirsty after baseball games.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 棒球比賽後我總是又熱又渴。

vocab.sentence: Too much coffee is not good for you.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 喝太多咖啡對你不好。

vocab.sentence: There aren't many shops near my house.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我家附近沒有很多商店。

vocab.sentence: A: I'm going home now. Bye. B: See you later.
vocab.sentence_chinese: A：我現在要回家了。再見。B：待會見。

vocab.sentence: The clerk is very nice. She helps me a lot.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位店員人很好。她幫了我很多忙。

vocab.sentence: A: May I come in? B: Sure. Please come in.
vocab.sentence_chinese: A：我可以進來嗎？B：當然。請進。

vocab.sentence: I always have orange juice for breakfast.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我早餐總是喝柳橙汁。

vocab.sentence: Mr. Chen wants a baby, but Mrs. Chen doesn't.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 陳先生想要一個孩子，但陳太太不想要。

vocab.sentence: Do you know anything about Van Gogh?
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你對梵谷有任何了解嗎？

vocab.sentence: Joanne is not happy, but everyone else is.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Joanne 不開心，但其他每個人都很開心。

vocab.sentence: Let me treat you to dinner later.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 晚點讓我請你吃晚餐吧。

vocab.sentence: Holly is a sweet girl. People love her.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Holly 是個甜美的女孩。大家都很喜歡她。

vocab.sentence: It's so hot. I want some ice cream.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 好熱。我想要吃點冰淇淋。

vocab.sentence: Chocolate ice cream is my favorite.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 巧克力冰淇淋是我的最愛。

vocab.sentence: A: How much is that comic book? B: It's two hundred dollars.
vocab.sentence_chinese: A：那本漫畫書多少錢？B：兩百元。

vocab.sentence: The man is painting the wall bright blue.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那個男人正在把牆壁漆成鮮豔的藍色。

vocab.sentence: It's too dark in my room. I can't read.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我房間太暗了。我沒辦法看書。

vocab.sentence: Miss Lee is an art teacher at Green Junior High School.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 李老師是格林國中的美術老師。

vocab.sentence: Have some hot milk before bed.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 睡前喝點熱牛奶吧。

vocab.sentence: The hamburger house on Elm Street is great.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 榆樹街上的那家漢堡店很棒。

vocab.sentence: My mom makes good chicken rice.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我媽媽做的雞肉飯很好吃。

vocab.sentence: Do you have some ice? My tea is too hot.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你有些冰塊嗎？我的茶太熱了。

vocab.sentence: Lara's favorite food is ice cream.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Lara 最喜歡的食物是冰淇淋。

vocab.sentence: In English, we always say "eat soup," not "drink soup."
vocab.sentence_chinese: 在英文裡，我們總是說「吃湯」，而不是「喝湯」。

vocab.sentence: That shop has really good sandwiches.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那家店有非常棒的三明治。

vocab.sentence: The Mona Lisa is a work by Leonardo da Vinci.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 蒙娜麗莎是達文西的作品。

vocab.sentence: She's showing her new watch to her friends.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 她正在向她的朋友們展示她的新秀錶。

vocab.sentence: Music is an important part in a movie.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 音樂是電影中重要的一部分。

vocab.sentence: The sky is gray today.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 今天天空是灰色的。

vocab.sentence: It's a quiet night. There are no people on the street.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這是一個安靜的夜晚。街上沒有人。

vocab.sentence: I'm reading some books by Charles Dickens.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我正在讀一些查爾斯·狄更斯的書。

phrases.sentence: A: Are you going to Ed's birthday party later? B: Of course.
phrases.sentence_chinese: A：你晚點要去 Ed 的生日派對嗎？B：當然。

phrases.sentence: May I have black coffee for here, please?
phrases.sentence_chinese: 請給我一杯內用的黑咖啡好嗎？

phrases.sentence: A: Do you want your juice for here or to go? B: To go. Thanks.
phrases.sentence_chinese: A：你的果汁要內用還是外帶？B：外帶。謝謝。

phrases.sentence: A: May I have some tea, please? B: Sure. Here you are.
phrases.sentence_chinese: A：請給我一些茶好嗎？B：好的。給你。

tips.label: Which 的選擇疑問句
tips.text: 使用 Which 詢問對方在兩者或多者中選擇哪一個。可單獨使用，也可接名詞。

tips.label: How much 詢問價錢
tips.text: 使用 How much 詢問物品的價錢。主詞為單數或不可數名詞時搭配 is，複數名詞時搭配 are。

notes.title: Which 的選擇疑問句
notes.rule: 用於詢問對方在「兩者」或「多者」之間做出選擇。
notes.description: Which 可以單獨當代名詞使用（Which is...），也可以當形容詞接名詞（Which N. is...）。句尾通常會加上「A or B?」提供選項。
examples: Which do you like, tea or juice? (你喜歡哪一個，茶還是果汁？)
Which shoes does he want, the black ones or the white ones? (他想要哪一雙鞋，黑色的還是白色的？)

notes.title: How much 詢問價錢
notes.rule: How much 專門用來問「多少錢」。
notes.description: 句型結構為「How much + be 動詞 + 物品？」。若物品為單數或不可數名詞，be 動詞用 is；若物品為複數，be 動詞用 are。回答時分別用 It is... 和 They are...。
examples: How much is the coffee? It's sixty dollars. (這咖啡多少錢？六十元。)
How much are the flowers? They are two hundred dollars. (這些花多少錢？兩百元。)

quiz.question: A: ________ do you want, coffee or tea? B: Tea, please.
quiz.hint: 詢問「咖啡或茶」兩者選一，疑問代名詞必須使用 Which。

quiz.question: A: ________ is the chicken rice? B: It's eighty dollars.
quiz.hint: 回答是價錢 (eighty dollars)，詢問價錢使用 How much。

quiz.question: A: Which does he like, hot dogs ________ sandwiches? B: He likes hot dogs.
quiz.hint: 選擇疑問句中，提供選項時使用連接詞 or (還是)。

quiz.question: A: How much ________ the flowers? B: They are two hundred dollars.
quiz.hint: 主詞 the flowers 為複數，be 動詞必須搭配 are。

quiz.question: A: Which is your favorite ________, the *Mona Lisa* or *The Starry Night*? B: The *Mona Lisa*.
quiz.hint: 《蒙娜麗莎》與《星夜》都是藝術「作品 (work)」。

quiz.question: A: ________ are the hamburgers? B: They are one hundred dollars.
quiz.hint: 回答為金額，詢問價錢的句型為 How much + be 動詞 + 物品。

quiz.question: A: Which ________ does she want, the bright one or the dark one? B: The bright one.
quiz.hint: 選項中有「明亮的 (bright)」與「暗的 (dark)」，最合理的對象是畫作 (painting)。

quiz.question: A: How much is the hot soup? B: ________ sixty dollars.
quiz.hint: 湯 (soup) 為不可數名詞，代名詞用 it，搭配 is 縮寫為 It's。

quiz.question: A: Which do you like, the sweet chocolate ________ the dark chocolate? B: The sweet one.
quiz.hint: 句首為 Which 詢問選擇，後方選項必須用 or 連接。

quiz.question: A: How much ________ the ice cream? B: It's forty dollars.
quiz.hint: ice cream 在此視為不可數名詞（或單數），be 動詞使用 is。

quiz.question: A: Which is ________ house? B: The red house over there is.
quiz.hint: 表達「凱爾的」，需使用名詞所有格 Kyle's。

quiz.question: A: How much are the sandwiches? B: ________ eighty dollars.
quiz.hint: 問句主詞 sandwiches 為複數，回答時必須用代名詞 They。

quiz.question: A: Which ________ do you want, orange juice or apple juice? B: Orange juice.
quiz.hint: 後方選項為柳橙汁和蘋果汁，皆屬於果汁 (juice)。

quiz.question: A: How much is the milk? B: It's fifty ________.
quiz.hint: 表達金額時，一元以上 dollar 必須加 s 變成複數 dollars。

quiz.question: A: Which is yours, the bright blue ________ or the dark black one? B: The bright blue one.
quiz.hint: 替代前面提過的單數名詞，使用不定代名詞 one。

quiz.question: A: How much are the ________? B: They are ninety dollars.
quiz.hint: 問句使用了 are，回答也用 They are，可知主詞必為複數名詞 flowers。

quiz.question: A: Which do you like, ________? B: I like the hot soup.
options: a hot soup or a hot soup
quiz.hint: 選擇疑問句後方選項使用 or 連接。soup 不可數，不加 a。

quiz.question: A: How much is ________? B: It's seventy dollars.
quiz.hint: 問句搭配 is，回答搭配 It's，主詞必須是單數或不可數名詞 (chicken rice)。

quiz.question: A: ________ NBA player does he like, James or Curry? B: He likes Curry.
quiz.hint: 詢問「哪一個」球員，句型為 Which + 名詞。

quiz.question: A: How much is the art book? B: ________
quiz.hint: the art book 為單數，用 It's 回答；金額大於一，dollar 要加 s。

quiz.question: A: Which shop has good ________, this one or that one? B: This one.
quiz.hint: 泛指「好吃的三明治」，可數名詞一般使用複數形 sandwiches。

quiz.question: A: Do you want your juice for here ________ to go? B: To go.
quiz.hint: 詢問內用或外帶的選擇，提供選項使用 or 連接。

quiz.question: A: Which do you want, hot tea or hot coffee? B: ________
quiz.hint: 選擇疑問句不能用 Yes/No 回答，必須直接說出選擇的項目。

quiz.question: A: How much ________ the milk and the juice? B: They are eighty dollars.
quiz.hint: 雖然 milk 和 juice 不可數，但兩者加起來視為複數，be 動詞用 are。

quiz.question: A: Let me ________ you to dinner later. B: Thank you so much!
quiz.hint: 根據課本單字，treat someone to... 表示「請某人吃... / 款待」。

quiz.question: A: Which ________ do you want, the hot tea or the cold tea? B: The hot tea.
quiz.hint: 選項中提供了熱茶 (hot tea) 與冷茶 (cold tea)，可知詢問的是「茶 (tea)」。

quiz.question: A: ________ are the sandwiches? B: They are one hundred dollars.
quiz.hint: 答句為價錢 (one hundred dollars)，詢問價錢必須使用 How much。

quiz.question: A: Which ________ does he want to see, the *Mona Lisa* or *The Starry Night*? B: The *Mona Lisa*.
quiz.hint: 《蒙娜麗莎》與《星夜》都是「畫作 (painting)」。

quiz.question: A: How much is the sweet ________? B: It's thirty dollars.
quiz.hint: be 動詞為 is，後方必須接單數或不可數名詞。chocolate (巧克力) 為不可數名詞。

quiz.question: A: Which do you want to drink, ________? B: Milk, please.
quiz.hint: 選擇疑問句中，提供兩個選項時，必須使用對等連接詞 or (還是)。

quiz.question: A: How much ________ the hot coffee? B: It's ninety dollars.
quiz.hint: coffee (咖啡) 為不可數名詞，be 動詞必須搭配 is。

quiz.question: A: Which part of the movie do you like, the happy part ________ the sad part? B: The happy part.
quiz.hint: 句首為 Which 詢問選擇，後方兩個選項 (happy part / sad part) 必須用 or 連接。

quiz.question: A: How much are the ________? B: They are fifty dollars.
quiz.hint: 問句與答句的 be 動詞皆為 are，主詞必須為複數名詞 (flowers)。

quiz.question: A: ________ does she want for dinner, chicken rice or sandwiches? B: She wants chicken rice.
quiz.hint: 後方有 or 提供選項讓對方選擇，疑問詞要用 Which。

quiz.question: A: How much is the ________? B: It's forty dollars.
quiz.hint: 問句使用 is，主詞必須是單數或不可數名詞 (soup)。

quiz.question: A: Which ________ is yours, the red one or the blue one? B: The blue one.
quiz.hint: 根據語意，詢問哪一朵「花 (flower)」是紅色的或藍色的最符合邏輯與課本單字。

quiz.question: A: May I have some hot tea ________, please? B: Sure. Here you are.
quiz.hint: 點餐時常見用語，to go 表「外帶」，for here 表「內用」。

quiz.question: A: ________ B: They are one hundred and twenty dollars.
quiz.hint: 答句為 They are + 價錢，問句必須是詢問複數物品的價錢 (How much are...)。

quiz.question: A: Which ________ does Mr. Chen want, a boy or a girl? B: A boy.
quiz.hint: 對應課本單字例句，Mr. Chen 想要一個「嬰兒 (baby)」。男孩或女孩都是嬰兒。

quiz.question: A: Is there ________ else you want to buy? B: No, thanks.
quiz.hint: anything else 為常見搭配，意指「任何其他的東西」。

quiz.question: A: How much are the books ________ Charles Dickens? B: They are five hundred dollars.
quiz.hint: 介系詞 by 可用來表示作品是「被 / 由」某人創作的。

quiz.question: A: Which do you want, a hot dog or a hamburger? B: ________
quiz.hint: Which 疑問句不能用 Yes/No 簡答，必須直接回答選擇的項目。

quiz.question: A: I'm always hot and ________ after baseball games. B: Let's get some juice.
quiz.hint: 棒球比賽後感到熱且「口渴 (thirsty)」，所以提議去喝果汁。

quiz.question: A: How much is the ice cream? B: ________ fifty dollars.
quiz.hint: 問句主詞 the ice cream 為不可數名詞，答句代名詞用 it，搭配 is。

quiz.question: A: Which is ________ favorite work, the *Mona Lisa* or *The Starry Night*? B: The *Mona Lisa*.
quiz.hint: 修飾名詞 work (作品)，必須使用所有格 your (你的)。

quiz.question: A: Do you want your coffee for here or ________? B: For here, please.
quiz.hint: 內用為 for here，對應的外帶片語為 to go。

quiz.question: A: ________ are the chicken rice and the soup? B: They are one hundred dollars.
quiz.hint: 答句為價錢，必須用 How much 詢問。兩個品項相加視為複數，故用 are。

quiz.question: A: Which ________ is nice, the one on Elm Street or the one on Oak Street? B: The one on Elm Street.
quiz.hint: 位於某條街道上 (on Elm Street) 的地點，最合理的是「商店 (shop)」。

quiz.question: A: ________ B: It's thirty dollars.
quiz.hint: 答句為 It's + 價錢，問句必須是詢問單數/不可數物品的價錢，且用 How much。

quiz.question: A: Are you going to the shop ________? B: Of course.
quiz.hint: later 為時間副詞，表示「稍後；晚點」，符合語意與文法位置。

phrases.sentence_chinese: A：你晚點要去 Ed 的生日派對嗎？B：當然。

phrases.sentence_chinese: 請給我一杯內用的黑咖啡好嗎？

grammar.sentence: Which do you like, coffee or tea?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你喜歡哪一個，咖啡還是茶？

grammar.sentence: How much is the painting on the wall?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 牆上的那幅畫作多少錢？

grammar.sentence: Which is your house, the red one or the blue one?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 哪一個是你的房子，紅色的還是藍色的？

grammar.sentence: How much are the beautiful flowers?
Which NBA player does she like, James or Curry?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她喜歡哪一位 NBA 球員，詹皇還是柯瑞？

grammar.sentence: How much is the hot coffee for here?
Which do you want, orange juice or apple juice?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你想要哪一個，柳橙汁還是蘋果汁？

grammar.sentence: How much is the sweet chocolate?
Which shop is nice, this one or that one?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 哪一間商店不錯，這間還是那間？

grammar.sentence: How much is the chicken rice?
Which does he want, hot dogs or sandwiches?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他想要哪一個，熱狗還是三明治？

grammar.sentence: How much is the hot soup?
Which part of the movie do you like?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你喜歡這部電影的哪一個部分？

grammar.sentence: How much is the art book?
Which is Kyle's house?
How much are the hamburgers?
Which flower do you want, the bright one or the dark one?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你想要哪一朵花，鮮豔的還是暗色的？

grammar.sentence: How much is the cold milk?
Which do you want to drink, milk or juice?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你想喝哪一個，牛奶還是果汁？

grammar.sentence: How much is the ice cream?
Which is your favorite work?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 哪一個是你最喜歡的作品？

grammar.sentence: How much are the sandwiches and the coffee?
Which does Brody like, hot dogs or sandwiches?
grammar.sentence_chinese: Brody 喜歡哪一個，熱狗還是三明治？

grammar.sentence: How much is that comic book?
Which do you want, the bright blue one or the dark black one?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你想要哪一個，明亮藍色的還是暗黑色的？

grammar.sentence: How much is the tea to go?
Which street is quiet, Elm Street or Oak Street?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 哪一條街道很安靜，榆樹街還是橡樹街？

grammar.sentence: How much are the cookies?
Which clerk is nice?
How much is it?
